title: Reach ≥ 2 fully localized languages: UI + key guides, safety terms accuracy-reviewed
context: The M3 Definition of Shipped requires at least 2 fully localized languages (UI + key guides). l10n-015 and l10n-016 establish the first non-English locale. This task adds a second language and ensures both locales are complete for UI and at least key guides. Priority languages should be partner-driven. Each localized guide must have its safety block reviewed for accuracy in the target language. Depends on l10n-016 (first locale must be complete).
objective: Add a second fully localized language to oer-science-labs, covering both the UI message catalog and at least the key guides from content-018. Ensure the first locale (l10n-015/l10n-016) is also complete for key guides. Every localized safety block must be reviewed for accuracy in the target language by a competent speaker paired with a safety reviewer. Priority language choice should reflect partner input from partner-017.
acceptanceCriteria: A second non-English locale is added with a complete UI message catalog passing the build-time completeness check
At least the key guides (determined in consultation with the partner or steward) are localized into the second language, with all safety blocks reviewed for accuracy
The first locale from l10n-015/l10n-016 is confirmed complete for key guides (if not already done)

For each new localized guide: safety block translation is reviewed for safety-meaning accuracy by a competent speaker of the target language paired with a safety reviewer; science accuracy is confirmed
Units, number formatting, and date formatting are localized appropriately for each new locale
Source attribution and contentLicense: CC-BY-4.0 are preserved in all translations
All localized guides pass CI schema-validation, exclusion-list check, cost-ceiling check, and completeness check
Translation review sign-off (reviewer names, safety-accuracy confirmation) is recorded in each PR-tied review-log entry
Safe fallback to English is verified for all new locales
output: Pull requests adding a second fully localized language (UI + key guides, safety-accuracy-reviewed) to the oer-science-labs repository, completing the ≥ 2 languages requirement for M3.
